candidates.why: Supplemental maturity schedule line, but values are blank and a cleaner reported current debt line exists.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Direct match for current portion of debt and explicitly excludes leases, fitting STD definition well.
Also a plausible short-term debt label for some periods, but could overlap with components and is less consistently populated.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Used the clean current debt line that explicitly excludes leases. Did not add lease liabilities. Although 'Current interest-bearing loans and borrowings' appears in one period, including both could risk overlap/double counting.

candidates.why: Deferred tax liability is not taxes payable/current tax payable under the accruals definition.
Tax receivable asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: No clear current tax payable / taxes payable line is present. Deferred tax and tax receivable lines were excluded.
